memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:6:9.snippet: Context: **Project:** The Office — multiplayer virtual office inside Discord (inspired by Gather.town); **Team:** 10 people (PM, 2 Devs, 5 Tech Artists, 2 Artists); **Tech Stack:** Node.js + Express + WebSocket + Canvas 2D (pixel art); **Hosting:** Railway (WebSocket server) + Gi

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:14:17.snippet: Architecture: Express + WebSocket (ws) server; Rate limiter: 100 msgs/min per connection; Session persistence: players can reconnect with sessionId; Input sanitization: XSS protection on name/text

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:18:21.snippet: Architecture: Structured JSON logging with timestamp, level; Graceful error handling (uncaught exceptions); Health/stats endpoints; Proximity-based chat (3 tile radius)

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:24:27.snippet: Architecture: Canvas 2D rendering; Pixel art sprites (procedurally drawn); 8 color palettes for players; Walk animation (4-frame cycle)

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:28:31.snippet: Architecture: Status system (available/focus/meeting/break); Proximity indicators (rings); Auto-hide chat with transition; Reconnect with exponential backoff

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:34:37.snippet: Architecture: Open Office (10x8) — work area; Focus Room (4x4) — silence; Cafeteria (6x8) — social; Arcade (8x6) — minijuegos

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:41:44.snippet: Key Fixes Applied: Keys + chat input conflict — solved with focus check; Movement throttle — 55ms minimum between moves; Zone boundaries — clamp to world limits; Ghost players — heartbeat with 30s timeout

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:45:47.snippet: Key Fixes Applied: Session persistence — reconnects preserve identity; XSS protection — sanitized inputs; Rate limiting — 100 msgs/min cap

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:50:51.snippet: Test Suite: `tests/game.test.js` — 7 automated tests; Covers: health, stats, WS connect, join, move, chat, status

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:54:57.snippet: Lessons Learned: Railway doesn't support persistent WebSockets → use WebSocketServer properly with heartbeat; Canvas pixel art needs careful coordinate math; Proximity chat needs audio level indicators; Status needs frontend + backend sync

memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:60:63.snippet: Next Steps: Sprites pixel art from Artists; Music per zone (embedded audio); Minijuegos in Arcade; Discord Activity API integration
